---
title: "Mr. Rudd"
---

## Mr. Rudd

### Description

exceptionally tall

### Biography

This person,  recently dead, unearthed by bodysnatchers, and evidently a coachman, was perhaps John Scholar Rudd (d.September 1838).

### Letters

- Letter from 25 September 1838
- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
